panels.description: Close up shot of the narrator's face, eyes wide with distress, hand trembling against chest, dark moody lighting, high contrast shadows.

bubbles.text: Every thought of it is anguish... yet I long to see the mountains again.

panels.description: Wide shot: The narrator and Clerval walking through a majestic, sun-dappled ancient forest in Windsor, deer grazing in the distance, soft golden hour lighting.

bubbles.text: The majestic oaks and the deer were all novelties to us.

panels.description: Wide shot: The city of Oxford with its ancient stone towers and spires reflecting in the placid Isis river, a dreamlike, historical atmosphere.

bubbles.text: The memory of Charles I and his fallen companions lingered over the spires of Oxford.

panels.description: Medium close-up: The narrator standing alone near an old stone wall in Oxford, look of profound sadness, looking down at hands, background slightly blurred, cinematic lighting with heavy shadows indicating internal gloom.

bubbles.text: I am a blasted tree... the iron has eaten into my flesh. I sink back into my miserable self.
